6.response: {"Q0":"No. Maybe one green turned to red."}

11.response: {"Q0":"Have no idea. Maybe if with time the concentration declines? It was definitely very long timewise."}

13.response: {"Q0":"Nice game, but as I said, a little too long :-) Thanks for letting me participate!"}

0.response: {"Q0":"For the galaxy: roughly calculated half of the bigger bar and saw if it was more or less than the other number. Then decided accordingly. For the meteor shower I collected the gems first, then greens"}

7.response: {"Q0":"No, it was fast so I didn't even notice."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Definitely the galaxy. The planets were easy to do almost automatically. The galaxy required constant concentration and reactiveness"}
